prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, bright and polished aesthetic. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim and silver hair, stands beside Ari Brightford, a masculine crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron with ash-stained gloves. Mira holds open a leather-bound ledger, pointing to a specific line item. Ari leans in, looking at the ledger with a focused, friendly expression. Camera is a steady medium shot, capturing the bustling guild hall background with soft ambient light. No text, no watermarks.

Same continuous shot, same Japanese fantasy guild hall. Ari Brightford nods, then lifts a set of rolled-up armor blueprints from his workbench and unrolls them across the table. Mira Ledgerfall shifts the ledger to make space, both characters now looking down at the blueprints in a collaborative, cooperative gesture of planning. Camera maintains steady framing, consistent lighting, and character positions. No text, no watermarks.
